analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces new EU priorities for cooperation with the Council of Europe on rule of law, focusing on fighting corruption and protecting whistle-blowers, and invites people to an event. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly about historical success or overcoming past obstacles; no. EU2 (EU is united) – no mention of unity or agreements among member states; no. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – yes: it highlights concrete, practical EU action (rule of law mechanism, anti-corruption, whistle-blower protection) that addresses citizens’ concerns and invites engagement, indicating usefulness within the EU. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not framed as pioneering leadership; neutral announcement; no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – focus is internal EU rule of law rather than global defense of rights; no. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – cooperation with CoE is multilateral, but the emphasis is on internal mechanisms; insufficient to claim global contribution; no. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
